curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff: utils.py contained the load_yaml() function using yaml.load() with yaml.Loader, and provision.py also directly called yaml.load() in its main() function. Both were patched to use yaml.safe_load(). Sibling file study.py in the same directory contains the identical vulnerable pattern (yaml.load with yaml.Loader in its main function) but was not patched in this commit. Pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization is correct per CWE-502 and the patch which switches from unsafe yaml.load() to yaml.safe_load().
